name: Zoo dataset
description: The Zoo dataset contains information about 101 animals, each described by 16 Boolean attributes (such as hair, feathers, eggs, milk, etc.) and one categorical class label indicating the animal's type (e.g., mammal, bird, reptile, fish, amphibian, insect, or invertebrate). It is commonly used for classification tasks in machine learning to predict the type of an animal based on its physical characteristics.
